title: apium insulare
intro: Apium insulare, also known as Rock Celery or Wild Celery, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Western Asia, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Apium insulare include relieving digestive issues, reducing pain and inflammation, and providing antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Apium insulare can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to aid in digestion and alleviate various health issues.
